output: Executed batch 6 task T6. Added focused regression coverage for variant-aware selection normalization, source-derived task creation, and direct completion-time placement, all requested edge suites passed, the full `supabase/functions/complete_task/` module passed with the new `placement.test.ts`, and the batch checkpoint was written.
deviations: Ran the requested edge suites with `--config config/testing/vitest.edge.config.ts` because the default app Vitest config excludes `supabase/functions/**`.

The completion-asset identity assertions requested for T6 were already present in `supabase/functions/complete_task/generation-handlers.test.ts` from batch 4, so this batch added the missing direct placement regression file instead of duplicating those assertions in another existing test file.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added focused regression coverage for variant-aware selection normalization, source-derived task creation, and completion-time placement, then re-ran the requested edge suites plus the full `complete_task` module with all tests passing.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verified the updated suites assert on `variant_id` specifically across the revised contract: normalization preserves `variant_id`, create-task requests carry `source_variant_id` and `anchor_variant_id`, generation-handler tests already assert `CompletionAssetRef.variant_id`, and the new placement tests assert the registry entry stores `variantId` for the completed asset.
